- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Created and maintained in this repository.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Stack and requirements are set to C++ backend, Svelte frontend, iCal birthday view, vCard submission, temporary vCard storage, sender abstraction, Docker, GitHub Actions, and devcontainer support.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Initialized backend, frontend, storage, Docker, CI, and workspace config files in repository root.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented iCal parsing, vCard generation/submission endpoint, sender strategy channels, temporary vCard cleanup logic, and custom frontend UI flow.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No mandatory workspace extension install step required; devcontainer recommends C++, CMake, and Svelte extensions.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Backend CMake build succeeds. Frontend production build succeeds.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Skipped. Standard project commands in README are sufficient for this setup.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Summary: Not auto-launched. Use local commands or Docker compose to run.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and this instruction file are up to date and HTML comments removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
